approvalHandoff.expectedPrompt: First copy your one-time code, then open https://github.com/login/device to approve the workflow scope; keep the terminal session open until gh reports success.
approvalHandoff.interactiveApprovalNote: This is an interactive OAuth device flow; keep the terminal session open until gh reports success. If the browser approval is not completed, gh auth status will still omit workflow.
approvalHandoff.sensitiveValuePolicy: Do not store, log, or paste the one-time device code into project files; the operator copies it from the local CLI prompt only.
approvalHandoff.incompleteApprovalSignal: Token scopes still omit workflow after the refresh attempt, or the gh auth refresh session was cancelled or timed out.
approvalHandoff.fallback: If browser approval cannot be completed, use each workflow row's installAction: open GitHub edit-file pages for existing mismatched files and new-file pages only for missing files.
approvalHandoff.stopCondition: Do not run install-remote-workflow-files.mjs, gh workflow run, publish copy, or archive proof until the recheck reports workflowScopeAvailable=true or the GitHub UI path has applied each workflow row's installAction on the default branch.

acceptanceChecklist.label: Operator auth path
acceptanceChecklist.required: Use a workflow-scope GitHub CLI token or a workflow-capable GitHub UI session before writing workflow files to the default branch.
acceptanceChecklist.evidence: workflowScopeAvailable=true; workflowScopeInstallBlocked=false; workflowScope.scopes=gist, read:org, repo, workflow; workflowScopeMissing=none; workflowScopeRefreshCommand=gh auth refresh -h github.com -s workflow

acceptanceChecklist.label: Local template parity
acceptanceChecklist.required: Local repository workflow targets must exist and match the prepared workflow templates before remote installation.

acceptanceChecklist.label: Remote workflow file parity
acceptanceChecklist.required: Remote default-branch workflow files must exist and match the local template SHA-256 values.

acceptanceChecklist.label: Workflow visibility
acceptanceChecklist.required: GitHub Actions must list both workflows before any dispatch command is suggested.
acceptanceChecklist.evidence: remoteWorkflowVisibilityReady=true; workflowListCommand=gh workflow list --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --all --json name,path,state,id

acceptanceChecklist.label: Dispatch guard
acceptanceChecklist.required: Keep gh workflow run commands withheld until remoteWorkflowFilesReady=true, remoteWorkflowVisibilityReady=true, and allDispatchReady=true.

blockerResolutionChecklist.dispatchGuard: Do not run gh workflow run until every action_required item has passed and verify-launch-handoff reports safeToDispatch=true.

items.label: Resolve workflow auth path
items.action: Refresh GitHub CLI with workflow scope, or choose the GitHub UI path with a workflow-capable browser session.
items.expectedValue: workflowScopeAvailable=true; workflowScopeInstallBlocked=false, or GitHub UI path chosen to apply each workflow row's installAction on the default branch.
items.stopCondition: If workflowScopeInstallBlocked=true remains after recheck, do not run the CLI installer; use the GitHub UI path and keep dispatch withheld.
items.evidence: workflowScopeAvailable=true; workflowScopeInstallBlocked=false; workflowScope.scopes=gist, read:org, repo, workflow; workflowScopeMissing=none; workflowScopeRefreshCommand=gh auth refresh -h github.com -s workflow

items.label: Confirm local workflow templates
items.action: Regenerate or restage local workflow targets if template parity fails before copying anything to GitHub.
items.expectedValue: localTargetParityReady=true; each local target SHA-256 matches its template SHA-256.
items.stopCondition: Do not create remote workflow files from stale or mismatched local targets.

items.label: Prove remote workflow file parity
items.action: Apply each workflow row's installAction on the default branch, then compare remote SHA-256 values against local templates.
items.expectedValue: remoteWorkflowFilesReady=true; every workflow file has remoteExists=true and remoteMatchesTemplate=true.
items.stopCondition: If any workflow file is missing_on_default_branch or sha_mismatch, do not run dispatch.

items.label: Prove GitHub Actions visibility
items.action: List repository workflows and rerun the dispatch plan after remote file parity passes.
items.expectedValue: remoteWorkflowVisibilityReady=true; Publish JooPark Pages and Watch JooPark Candidate Drift are visible.
items.stopCondition: If GitHub Actions does not list both workflows, keep suggestedDispatchCommands empty.
items.evidence: remoteWorkflowVisibilityReady=true; workflowListCommand=gh workflow list --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --all --json name,path,state,id

items.label: Keep dispatch guarded
items.action: Rerun launch handoff verification and use only suggestedDispatchCommands after the guard reports safeToDispatch=true.
items.expectedValue: allDispatchReady=true; safeToDispatch=true before gh workflow run.
items.stopCondition: If safeToDispatch=false, gh workflow run commands must stay withheld.

items.label: Capture live launch proof after dispatch
items.action: After guarded dispatch completes, capture Pages site proof, workflow run proof, freshness, release receipt, and public-claim guard evidence.
items.expectedValue: postPublishEvidenceReady=true; evidenceFresh=true; readyForExternalClaim=true only after live proof is saved.
items.stopCondition: Do not post public launch copy, archive proof, or claim readyForExternalClaim until all launch proof fields are live and successful.

postInstallEvidenceIntake.quickProofReceipt:
JooPark Post-Install Quick Proof Receipt
Status: collect_post_install_proof
Repo: biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects
Default branch: main
Proof complete: false
Fields complete: 2/6
Quick proof steps: 4

4-step proof checklist:
1. remote_file_parity: run node scripts/check-remote-workflow-files.mjs --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --write; expect remoteWorkflowFilesReady=true; paste into remote_parity_proof
2. actions_visibility: run gh workflow list --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --all --json name,path,state,id; expect remoteWorkflowVisibilityReady=true; paste into actions_visibility_proof
3. dispatch_readiness: run node scripts/plan-publish-dispatch.mjs --live --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects; expect allDispatchReady=true; paste into dispatch_readiness_proof
4. handoff_verifier: run node scripts/verify-launch-handoff.mjs --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --write --markdown; expect safeToDispatch=true before gh workflow run; paste into handoff_verifier_proof

Mapped proof fields:
1. remote_file_parity -> remote_parity_proof: evidence_required; completed=false; current=remoteWorkflowFilesReady=false; filesReady=1/2; missing=0; mismatch=1; expected=remoteWorkflowFilesReady=true and every workflow file has remoteExists=true and remoteMatchesTemplate=true.
2. actions_visibility -> actions_visibility_proof: proof_ready; completed=true; current=remoteWorkflowVisibilityReady=true; expected=remoteWorkflowVisibilityReady=true and GitHub Actions lists both workflow files.
3. dispatch_readiness -> dispatch_readiness_proof: evidence_required; completed=false; current=dispatchReady=false; driftDispatchReady=true; allDispatchReady=false; expected=dispatchReady=true, driftDispatchReady=true, and allDispatchReady=true.
4. handoff_verifier -> handoff_verifier_proof: evidence_required; completed=false; current=safeToDispatch=false; allDispatchReady=false; expected=verify-launch-handoff reports safeToDispatch=true before gh workflow run.

Six evidence fields remain required:
- Pages workflow commit: [paste commit URL or SHA for .github/workflows/joopark-pages.yml on the default branch]
- Drift Watch workflow commit: [paste commit URL or SHA for .github/workflows/joopark-drift-watch.yml on the default branch]
- Remote parity proof: [paste generatedAt plus remoteWorkflowFilesReady=true from data/remote-workflow-file-check.json]
- Actions visibility proof: [paste gh workflow list output showing both workflow paths visible]
- Dispatch readiness proof: [paste generatedAt plus dispatchReady=true, driftDispatchReady=true, and allDispatchReady=true]
- Handoff verifier proof: [paste verify-launch-handoff status plus safeToDispatch=true before gh workflow run]

Stop condition: do not run gh workflow run, archive proof, or claim launch until all six post-install evidence fields are filled and verify-launch-handoff reports safeToDispatch=true.

quickProofSteps.label: Remote workflow file check
quickProofSteps.guard: Confirm both default-branch workflow files exist and match local templates before checking Actions visibility.

quickProofSteps.label: Actions visibility check
quickProofSteps.guard: Confirm GitHub Actions lists both workflow files before planning dispatch.

quickProofSteps.label: Dispatch readiness plan
quickProofSteps.guard: Confirm pages and drift dispatch readiness are both true before final handoff verification.

quickProofSteps.label: Launch handoff verifier
quickProofSteps.guard: Do not run gh workflow run until every post-install evidence field has been filled, remoteWorkflowFilesReady=true, remoteWorkflowVisibilityReady=true, dispatchReady=true, driftDispatchReady=true, allDispatchReady=true, and verify-launch-handoff reports safeToDispatch=true.

quickProofFieldMappings.stopCondition: If any workflow file is missing_on_default_branch or sha_mismatch, do not run dispatch.

quickProofFieldMappings.expectedValue: remoteWorkflowVisibilityReady=true and GitHub Actions lists both workflow files.
quickProofFieldMappings.stopCondition: If GitHub Actions does not list both workflows, keep suggestedDispatchCommands empty.
If allDispatchReady=false, suggestedDispatchCommands must remain empty.

quickProofFieldMappings.expectedValue: verify-launch-handoff reports safeToDispatch=true before gh workflow run.
quickProofFieldMappings.stopCondition: If safeToDispatch=false, gh workflow run commands must stay withheld.

postInstallEvidenceIntake.dispatchGuard: Do not run gh workflow run until every post-install evidence field has been filled, remoteWorkflowFilesReady=true, remoteWorkflowVisibilityReady=true, dispatchReady=true, driftDispatchReady=true, allDispatchReady=true, and verify-launch-handoff reports safeToDispatch=true.
postInstallEvidenceIntake.stopCondition: Stop condition: do not run gh workflow run, archive proof, or claim launch until all six post-install evidence fields are filled and verify-launch-handoff reports safeToDispatch=true.
